Curated subset of `Access-Tool` copied into the repository for the textual export and Windows automation track.

Included:

- `LICENSE.md`
- `README.upstream.md`
- `src/access/access.py`
- `src/access/database.py`
- `src/access/form.py`
- `src/access/query.py`
- `src/access/module.py`
- `src/kraken.py`

Why this subset exists:

- it captures the useful behavior of the original tool;
- it documents how `.accdb.src` was produced;
- it preserves the COM-export reference path even after `referencias/` is removed.
